Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Our team typically responds within 2–4 hours during business hours. For urgent matters, please call us directly or reach us via WhatsApp for an instant reply.

Initial consultations are completely free. Our agency fee is only charged upon successful transaction completion, fully transparent and disclosed upfront.

Absolutely. We assist overseas clients throughout the entire process including virtual viewings, legal documentation, mortgage guidance and property handover.

We cover all major UAE markets including Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah and Ras Al Khaimah. Within Dubai we specialise in Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Business Bay and JVC.

Yes. Our dedicated commercial team handles offices, warehouses, retail spaces, staff accommodation and labour camps across Al Quoz, Sonapur and other industrial areas.

Yes, HomeKeys Real Estate is fully RERA registered and licensed by the Dubai Land Department (DLD). All our agents hold valid RERA certification cards.

UAE's trusted real estate agency committed to helping you find your perfect property.
